free_text: Measurement of the neutron capture cross-sections of
Dy and Hf in the energy region from 0.003 eV to 50 keV
J.H.Chang. Korea Atomic Energy Research Ins,
W.Namkung. Pohang University of Science and
repetition rate 40 Hz, pulse width 3 microsec,
electron energy 30 MeV, peak electron current 0.4 a
Detector assembly, each size 5*5 cm2 area, 7.5 cm
Correction for scattered high-energy neutrons were
made wth the help of graphite scattering plate
Fast neutrons were moderated in a octagonal water
tank 30 cm in diameter and 10 cm thick. Neutron
collimation system composed of B4-C, Pb, Li2-C-O3,
borated paraffin. Cadmium sheet 0.5 mm was placed
Data obtained from author via INTERNET
SD: Year of the JAERI-C-2000-005,125 ref.
